commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
# vLLM Auto-Tuner configuration
# Có thể override từng key bằng ENV var AUTOTUNER_*

paths:
  models_dir: /projects/MedTrivita/common/models
  container_models_dir: /models
  db_path: /home/data_team/usr/huynq/MLops/vllm-autotuner/data/results.db
  frontend_build_dir: /home/data_team/usr/huynq/MLops/vllm-autotuner/frontend/build

docker:
  default_image: vllm/vllm-openai:v0.18.1
  port_start: 9200
  port_end: 9300
  container_prefix: autotuner-

runtime:
  models_cache_ttl_s: 60

api:
  host: 0.0.0.0
  port: 9100
  cors_allow_origins:
    - "*"
